name: Liang

skills.name: Power Word - Trance
skills.description: Every second hit on the same target within a short time will deal an extra strike of damage.

skills.name: Power Word - Barrier
skills.description: Summons 4 barriers that shatter when touched by an enemy, inflicting damage, stun, and slow. Damage and slowing effects are reduced for enemies that touch multiple barriers.

skills.name: Power Word - Fate
skills.description: Summons a magic circle that deals damage to enemies within range while granting vision of the area. Liang gains Movement Speed while inside his magic circle.

skills.name: Power Word - Control
skills.description: Suppresses an enemy hero, dealing damage over time. When the suppression is complete, deals damage and stun enemies in range.

tips: Liang is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 51.5% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of the Arcane → Scepter of Reverberation → Mask of Agony → Savant's Wrath → Splendor → Void Staff.
Run Nightmare for stats that match Liang's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Power Word - Barrier → Power Word - Fate → Power Word - Control → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Liang excels into Han Xin, Lam, Mulan. Avoid blind picking into Li Xin, Mayene, Mulan without team peel.

Liang is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 5.0% — expect Liang to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.

faqs.question: Is Liang good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Liang is Tier S+ Mage with 51.5% win rate, 0.8% pick rate, and 5.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Liang build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of the Arcane, Scepter of Reverberation, Mask of Agony, Savant's Wrath, Splendor, Void Staff. Run Nightmare arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Liang?
faqs.answer: Pick Li Xin, Mayene, Mulan into Liang. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Liang completes core items. Liang struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Liang counter?
faqs.answer: Liang is strong into Han Xin, Lam, Mulan according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Liang when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Liang good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Liang is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 5.0% — expect Liang to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.

faqs.question: What lane should Liang play?
faqs.answer: Liang is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Liang?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Nightmare arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Liang or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Liang vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Liang has +0.4% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Liang when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Liang?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 5.0% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Mage.
